hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]; then REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null; git checkout main 2>/dev/null; if git merge --ff-only "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then bash "$REPO/.claude/version-bump.sh" 2>/dev/null || git push origin main 2>/dev/null; fi; git checkout "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; fi; true
